---
title: "Projects"
---

A few projects I've worked on during graduate school. Each card links to project documentation.
<div class="row">

<div class="col-sm-6">
<a href="https://github.com/jshtulman1/fars_dashboard" class="project-link">
<div class="panel panel-default project-card">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">FARS Dashboard</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p>An interactive R Shiny dashboard that makes NHTSA's fatal traffic crash data easier to explore. Users can compare states with a choropleth map, view national and state level fatality rates, and break down the factors contributing to fatal crashes, supporting researchers and policy analysts working on traffic safety.</p>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="col-sm-6">
<a href="https://github.com/jshtulman1/NHANES_CLUSTERING" class="project-link">
<div class="panel panel-default project-card">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">NHANES Prediabetes Phenotypes</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p>A cluster analysis of National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey (NHANES) data to identify distinct phenotypes among adults with prediabetes, with the goal of informing more targeted prevention strategies.</p>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

</div>
